original: This single use shield booster can be used to replenish up to 40 points of shielding all at once. The only downside is that subjecting a shield generator to such large power surges in quick succession would damage or destroy it. You can only use shield boosters once per fight!
You need to have a shield generator in order to use a shield booster.
{var0}+{var1}+" can’t use a shield booster without a shield generator!
context: <<POS:06788648>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" can’t use a shield booster without a shield generator!")

original: You probably shouldn’t use a shield booster while having full shields... You might overload something.
{var0}+{var1}+" pulls out a shield booster, but quickly puts it back.
context: <<POS:06788959>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" pulls out a shield booster, but quickly puts it back.")

original: Using another shield booster would probably destroy your shield generator.
{var0}+{var1}+" cannot use another shield booster--doing so will risk destroying "+{var2}.mfn("his","her","its")+" shield generator.
context: <<POS:06789249>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short,var2=e>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" cannot use another shield booster--doing so will risk destroying "+e.mfn("his","her","its")+" shield generator.")

original: You press the booster to the charge port on your shield generator and hear the telltale hum of rapidly discharging electrical energy. After a second, the booster beeps and blinks red before dying completely.
